title: p2present presentation manifest
description: Schema for a p2present.json v1.0 manifest. See SPEC.md for prose + examples. Every src (video/deck/asset) may be an https URL, an ipfs:// CID, or a magnet: link.

title.description: Presentation title (shown in the header / document title).

video.description: The talk video. `sources` is an ordered fallback list: the player tries each until one loads.

provider.description: youtube (iframe), mp4 (HTML5 video), webtorrent (magnet streamed via file.renderTo), and ipfs (gateway-resolved CID). Sources are an ordered fallback list, so a failed p2p source falls through to the next.

src.description: youtube: video id or watch/youtu.be URL. mp4: URL to the file (resolved against the manifest URL if relative). webtorrent: magnet. ipfs: CID or ipfs:// URI.

poster.description: Optional poster image URL (used by the mp4 provider).

deck.description: The slide deck. `sources` is an ordered fallback list of URLs.

type.description: Deck adapter to use. "html" = an <iframe>'d HTML deck (deck-stage / reveal.js / sections); "pdf" = a PDF rendered page-per-slide with pdf.js; "embed" = an external embeddable slide URL (Google Slides / SpeakerDeck / Canva …) shown read-only in an <iframe>.

sources.description: Ordered fallback list of deck URLs. Each src may be an https URL, an ipfs:// CID, or a magnet: link (the transport is inferred from the scheme).

src.description: URL to the deck (resolved against the manifest URL if relative).

embed.description: Optional deep-link config for deck.type "embed" only. Lets the player point the embedded slide URL at a given slide; omit for a display-only embed.

nav.description: How to encode the slide in the URL: "hash" (#param=N, no reload) or "query" (?param=N, reloads the frame).

param.description: URL parameter name carrying the slide number. Default "slide".

offset.description: Slide value for slide 1 (e.g. 0 for a 0-based embed). Default 1.

slideCount.description: Total slide count (used for the counter when the deck can't report it; required for "embed" decks, which can't introspect the foreign frame).

thumbnails.description: Optional authored slide thumbnails for the scrubber preview. Either an array of image URLs (indexed by slide, 1-based) or an array of {slide, src}. URLs resolve against the manifest URL if relative. PDF decks auto-render thumbnails when this is omitted; HTML decks fall back to a slide-label card.

timing.description: Slide-boundary cues. Either an inline array of cues OR a string path/URL to an external JSON file (an array, or an object with a `timing` array).

time.description: Cue time in float SECONDS, or a "HH:MM:SS.mmm" / "MM:SS" string.

oneOf.description: Path/URL to an external timing JSON file.

subtitles.description: Caption tracks. Rendered as native <track> on mp4, or a synced overlay on YouTube.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag (or any unique key).

label.description: Human label shown in the CC menu.

src.description: URL to the .vtt or .srt file (resolved against the manifest URL if relative).

format.description: Caption format. Inferred from the file extension if omitted (.srt → srt, else vtt).

default.description: If true, this track is shown by default.

resolvers.description: Override the default networks the phase-2 providers consume.

ipfsGateways.description: IPFS gateway URL templates; use {cid} as a placeholder.

sig.description: Optional author signature (Phase 8). Proves who published the manifest; the player verifies it on load and shows a "✓ signed by …" badge but NEVER blocks playback. Signed payload = the canonical JSON of the whole manifest including this block's `alg`/`signer`/`canon` but excluding `signature` — so editing the manifest OR the claimed signer invalidates the signature. Add or remove this block freely; an unsigned manifest is fully valid.

alg.description: "eip191" = Ethereum wallet / raw secp256k1 key via the EIP-191 personal_sign prefix (signer is the recovered address — self-authenticating). "ed25519" = a raw Ed25519 keypair (the public key is stored in `signer.key`).

signer.description: Who signed. eip191 → { address }. ed25519 → { key, domain? }.

address.description: eip191: the signer's 0x Ethereum address (re-derived from the signature on verify; the stored value is for display + binding).

key.description: ed25519: the 32-byte raw public key, base64url (no padding).

domain.description: ed25519: optional human label (e.g. a domain) bound into the signature.

ens.description: Optional cached ENS name for display; the player reverse-resolves live and does not trust this.

signature.description: eip191: 0x + r(32) + s(32) + v(1) hex (65 bytes). ed25519: base64url of the 64-byte signature.

canon.description: Canonicalization id. Use "p2/jcs-1" (recursively sorted keys, minimal separators, UTF-8).

layout.description: Default layout. The user's interactive changes are persisted in localStorage and override these.

split.description: Slides-pane fraction of the split (0–1; clamped 0.15–0.85). Default 0.6.

captionPlacement.description: Where captions are drawn: "window" (default) overlays them along the bottom of the WHOLE player — slides + video, every layout mode incl. fullscreen; "video" keeps them inside the video pane (native <track> for mp4). The user can override this in the Subtitles menu (persisted in localStorage).
